subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! In this dawntide, when thou art accompanied by the fragrances from the gardens of the Kingdom, and art mindful of the divine friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در این صبحدم که بنفحات ریاض ملکوت قدم همقدم و بیاد دوستان الهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
